title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace
excerpt: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that's powered the bul...
content_html:
Bloomberg

Tue, July 21, 2026 at 8:25 AM MST

Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that's powered the bull market has more room to run.Julian Emanuel, Chief Equity & Quantitative Strategist at Evercore ISI, joins to talk tech volatility, the intact bull market, and earnings season.
content_text: Bloomberg Tue, July 21, 2026 at 8:25 AM MST Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that's powered the bull market has more room to run.Julian Emanuel, Chief Equity & Quantitative Strategist at Evercore ISI, joins to talk tech volatility, the intact bull market, and earnings season.

sentences.zh: 2026 年 7 月 21 日星期二上午 8:25（MST）

blocks.html_en: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that's powered the bull market has more room to run.Julian Emanuel, Chief Equity & Quantitative Strategist at Evercore ISI, joins to talk tech volatility, the intact bull market, and earnings season.

sentences.en: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that's powered the bull market has more room to run.Julian Emanuel, Chief Equity & Quantitative Strategist at Evercore ISI, joins to talk tech volatility, the intact bull market, and earnings season.
sentences.zh: 随着逢低买家出现，华尔街出现卷土重来，芯片制造商因押注推动牛市的人工智能交易有更大的运行空间而上涨，提振了股市。Evercore ISI 首席股票和量化策略师朱利安·伊曼纽尔 (Julian Emanuel) 与我们一起谈论科技波动性、完整的牛市和财报季。

content_html_zh:
布隆伯格

2026 年 7 月 21 日星期二上午 8:25（MST）

随着逢低买家出现，华尔街出现卷土重来，芯片制造商因押注推动牛市的人工智能交易有更大的运行空间而上涨，提振了股市。Evercore ISI 首席股票和量化策略师朱利安·伊曼纽尔 (Julian Emanuel) 与我们一起谈论科技波动性、完整的牛市和财报季。
